title: Goodbye and good luck
question: 把今天课文里“重要出发、送行、祝福和为别人骄傲”的线索放进机场送行、学校比赛和长时间离开的场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: My cousin will set out early tomorrow, so we will say goodbye and wish her good luck. She will take part in an important race, and we are proud of her.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 机场送行：表姐明天很早出发，所以我们去机场告别并祝她好运
options.english_template: My cousin ___ early tomorrow, so we will go to the airport to say goodbye and wish her good luck.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 学校比赛：朋友下个月要参加重要比赛，全班都为他骄傲
options.english_template: My friend will take part in an important race next month, and our class is very ___ him.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 长时间离开：爸爸要离开三周，但出发前我们有充裕时间见他
options.english_template: Dad will ___ three weeks, but we have plenty of time to see him before he leaves.
